Package recoder.kit

Class NameGenerator

java.lang.Object
recoder.kit.NameGenerator
public class NameGenerator extends Object
Generator for variable and method names creating an unbound series of names derived from short cut versions of the base name or by enumeration. The generator can be configured for short style (temporary variables) or long style (public names) naming schemes. The generator takes care that no Java keywords are generated.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    DEFAULT_STYLE
    Default style using short form for very long names only.
    static final int
    LONG_STYLE
    Long style attempting to closely match the original name.
    static final int
    SHORT_STYLE
    Short style using the shortest forms only.

    Constructor
    Description
    NameGenerator(String base)
    Create a generator for names based on the given name using default style.

    Create a generator for names based on the given name and style.
    NameGenerator(Type type)

  • Field Details

    • SHORT_STYLE

      public static final int SHORT_STYLE
      Short style using the shortest forms only. Useful for local names.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • DEFAULT_STYLE

      public static final int DEFAULT_STYLE
      Default style using short form for very long names only.

  • Constructor Details

    • NameGenerator

      public NameGenerator(String base)
      Create a generator for names based on the given name using default style.
      Parameters:
      base - the base name.

    • NameGenerator

      public NameGenerator(String base, int strategy)
      Create a generator for names based on the given name and style.
      Parameters:
      base - the base name.
      strategy - the style to use.

    • NameGenerator

      public NameGenerator(Type type)
      Create a generator for names based on the given type name. Uses short style for primitive types, default style otherwise.
      Parameters:
      type - the type to derive a name from.

  • Method Details

    • getNextCandidate

      public String getNextCandidate()
      Returns the next name candidate.
      Returns:
      the next derivation of the base name.
